titleStmt.title: SII 8.315: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 315. (A.R. No. 41 of 1903). ON THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE INTO THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nā yaṉārk
kut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Aṉumaṉuḻāṉ cūriyatevarā
ṉa koṅkarāyar pullāliyil viṭṭa toppukku tāṉa
ttārkku Eḻutiṉa cātaṉappaṭi coḻakulavallinallūr pul
lāliveḷāṉ maṉattukkiṉiyāṉāṉa kaṉakarāyaṉ muṉṉāḷ perumā
ḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar nāḷil naṭuvilmaṇṭalattukku A
tikārañceytu Ivarperāl Iṭṭa kikkinilai Eṉakkup paramāy
nāṉ celavaṟukkaiyil Ivarkku naṭuvilmaṇṭalattilum
coḻamaṇṭattilum Ivar kāṇi maṉai Aṭimai Uḷḷavai
Eṉ ṉaṉutāramāy nāṉ veṇṭuvārkku kuṭuttum Aṉupavi
ttumpotukaiyil coḻakulavallinallūr kiḻpiṭākai
pullālinattattil Ivvūr pullāliveḷāṉ Aruḷāḷaṉ
cetirāyaṉpakkal Intak kaṉakarāyaṉ vilaikoṇṭu Ivar
Aṉupavittuppontu Eṉṉutāṉa Inta nat(na)tattil to
ppu nāṉkellaikkuḷḷun tirunāmattukkāṇiyākat tanta
Ittoppu perumāḷ virapāṇṭiyatevarkku Eṭṭāvatu taimāta
mutal kaikkoṇṭu nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlattā(ā)paṉa
mum paṇṇi Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilile
kallum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum pārppatu [*] Ivai Aṉumaṉuḻāṉ
koṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.315 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
